query: Design a safe commit-to-production pipeline for this service.
Improve our release flow so artifacts are built once and promoted.
Choose rolling, blue-green, or canary delivery for this change.
Plan compatibility and rollback for application and database releases.
Design GitOps promotion, reconciliation, and break-glass controls.
Reduce delivery lead time without weakening verification.
Add evidence-based health gates to this deployment pipeline.
Make this manual production release repeatable and recoverable.
Design feature-control and cleanup for deploying before release.
Review this pipeline for environment drift and unsafe rollback.
Write a GitHub Actions job that runs pytest.
Diagnose this live production incident.
Design a microservice architecture for this domain.
Plan a PostgreSQL backfill across old and new app versions.
Fix this failing Docker build.
Explain what continuous integration means.
Review this source code for security vulnerabilities.
Create an SLO for our checkout endpoint.
Provision one Kubernetes Deployment manifest.
Commit and push these finished changes.
